find.match_belief: The moment two languages realize they've been speaking the same grammar—that's where the bridge lives.

profile.major: Arts, Technology & the Business of Innovation
profile.belief: Creativity happens when two separate systems recognize they've been trying to say the same thing.
profile.working_on: Machine learning that reads emotional weight in speech then remaps tone while preserving what was meant.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to harmonize human expression, believing that true connection arises from understanding and reframing shared emotions.
